description.value:
Receive Prescription processing staken-andermans-MA building blocks for patient L. van XXX_Meijs
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_afhandelen_voorschrift_ontvangen
Original description: TEST Scenarioset 8 Staken andermans MA Stoppen andermans toedieningsafspraak
Receive Prescription processing staken-andermans-MA resources in a transaction Bundle
Test server to handle a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '422037009' or category.coding.code = '373784005').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '1506773')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '26638')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '71587')))).count() = 2

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '422037009' or category.coding.code = '373784005').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '1506773')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '26638')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '71587')))).count() = 2

description.value: Confirm that the response Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '1506773|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (LISINOPRIL SANDOZ TABLET 10MG)
